zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Dickinson於1388年出生在英國越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Richard Dickinson18歲，母親Margaret Cooper18歲。他於1420年與Margaret Lambert在英國越可爾赫爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1475年在英國越可爾赫爾享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Dickinson于1388年出生在英国越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Richard Dickinson18岁，母亲Margaret Cooper18岁。他于1420年与Margaret Lambert在英国越可爾赫爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1475年在英国越可爾赫爾享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dickinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Dickenson , a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Dicun a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.
History: Jonathan Dickinson, the first president of the College of New Jersey (now Princeton), was born in Hatfield, MA, in 1688. Both his parents came from pioneer Connecticut Valley stock.

variants.name: Dickenson
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dicun, a pet form of Richard (see Dicken ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Dickinson was born in 1388, in Kingston upon Hull St Mary, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Dickinson, was 18 and his mother, Margaret Cooper, was 18. He married Margaret Lambert in 1420, in Hull, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1475, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 87.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Dickinson(이)가 1388년 영국 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Dickinson(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cooper(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 Margaret Lambert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Lambert em 1420, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1475, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Dickinson родился в 1388 г. в местности кингстон упон хулл ст мэри, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Dickinson было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cooper, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lambert в 1420 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.
